title: Shahnameh: Zahhak the Serpent King
description: The tyrant Zahhak, with serpents growing from his shoulders fed on human brains, rules for a thousand years until the blacksmith Kaveh raises his leather apron as a banner of revolution.
introduction: The tyrant Zahhak, with serpents growing from his shoulders fed on human brains, rules for a thousand years until the blacksmith Kaveh raises his leather apron as a banner of revolution.

translation.original_text: ز هر دوش ماری برآمد سیاه / دو مار سیه بر دو کتفش براه
translation.text: From each shoulder a black serpent grew — two black serpents upon his two shoulders.
